heading: Create Outbound VPC Peering Connections
body:
To create outbound VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) peering connections to your stream processing workspace:**Ui:**Atlas UITo create outbound VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) peering connections from your stream processing workspace
to your cloud provider VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) using the Atlas UI,
see [Add an Atlas Stream Processing Connection](atlas-sp-add-connection) and select **Apache Kafka**
as your connection type, and **Atlas UI** as your
interface.You must select `SASL_SSL` as your security protocol for VPC
peering connections.**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo create outbound VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) peering connections to your stream processing workspace using the API, see
[Return All Network Peering Connections in One Project](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-listgroupstreamvpcpeeringconnections)You must select `SASL_SSL` as your security protocol for VPC
peering connections.
